## What does this change?
A short description of what you've added or fixed.

## Why?
The problem or use case it addresses.

## How to test it
Steps to verify the change works (e.g. "start the server, open the control panel, click X").

## Checklist
- [ ] `python3 -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile('server.py', doraise=True)"` passes
- [ ] If the control panel was touched: the page loads and changed buttons work
- [ ] If the overlay was touched: `overlay.html` renders in a browser
- [ ] No `config.ini`, `match_state.json`, or `match_data.db` committed
- [ ] Tested on: (OS and scoring software)
